name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in West Jordan?

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + partial wages; third-party adds pain/suffering uncapped.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value includes medical bills, 66-75% wages (capped), future care; no pain/suffering in comp, but third-party adds it.[1] Utah has no general noneconomic cap for third-party; liens reduce net.[1] Key factors: total wages/OT lost; diminished capacity. Use settlement calculators cautiously; get attorney evaluation.[1]

description: Medical + partial wages; third-party adds pain/suffering uncapped.[1]
